messages.content: You are an expert Python programmer. You are given a function signature and a docstring. You need to complete the function body and also specify your confidence of your completion.

def split_words(txt):
    '''
    This function accepts a string and returns a list split by spaces if spaces exist; otherwise, it splits by commas. If there are no commas, it returns the count of lowercase letters with odd alphabetical positions where ord('a') is 0.
    Examples
    split_words("Hello world!") ➞ ["Hello", "world!"]
    split_words("Hello,world!") ➞ ["Hello", "world!"]
    split_words("abcdef") == 3 
    '''
